name: Arrive Silver Spring
bathroomsNote: 2BR plans range from 1BA (1,108 sq ft) to 2BA (1,170-1,300 sq ft); studio and 1BR are 1BA

notes.doorman: Multiple listing sources describe a 'fully staffed concierge desk' and at least one search summary cites 24/7 concierge; however, veryapt reviews note 'door security inconsistent' and the property's own site does not explicitly state 24-hour hours; 'Likely staffed' is the honest call
notes.inUnitLaundry: Rentable lists in-unit washer/dryer; Rentable also says 'select units'; veryapt reviewers mention floor-level laundry rooms as a building feature rather than in-unit appliances; availability per unit is not confirmed across all plans
notes.unitClimate: veryapt reviewers explicitly state residents cannot individually control heat/AC; the building switches systems seasonally
notes.balcony: Rentable and listing sites list 'private patios/balconies' as a unit feature; availability varies by unit
notes.wellMaintained: Apartmentratings.com (1,349 reviews) and veryapt (6.2/10, 13 reviews) both show mixed-to-negative trends: reports of rodent/roach infestations, maintenance requests requiring 4-5 follow-ups, cabinets deteriorating, and a significant ratings drop since new management and renovations began; some residents report responsive maintenance
notes.petFriendly: $25/month per pet (max 2 pets); no deposit required; breed restrictions apply (pit bulls, rottweilers, German shepherds, and mixes prohibited)
notes.packageRoom: Front desk handles package receipt; some reviewer complaints about occasional misplacement
notes.has2BRor1BRDen: 2BR floor plans confirmed; no 1BR+den plan found on floor plan pages (site lists studio, 1BR, 2BR only)
notes.buildingDetails: 16-story high-rise; 891 units; managed by Trinity Property Consultants
notes.currentSpecials: 6 weeks free on 12+ month leases (as of June 2026)
